# 2026-01-02 — Friday

Woke before the alarm, which is new.

Rolled back the ollama change. The perf gain wasn't worth the flakiness.

Wrote a test that failed for the right reason. Rare enough to note.

Refactored tokenizers. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Refactored anthropic. Feels lighter now, not necessarily faster.

Ran into Yasmin at Serra da Estrela. First time in months. Agreed to dinner next week; we'll see.

Reading the Ursula Le Guin essays again. The one on anger still lands.

Hiked Lisbon on Saturday. Wind hard enough to lean into.
